questionHtml: Calculate the pressure, in kPa, of this gas in a 10.0 dm3 air bag at 127°C, assuming no gas escapes.

meta.title: Calculate the pressure, in kPa, of this gas in a 10.0 dm3 air bag at 127°C, assuming no gas escapes.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.5.3—The molar volume of an ideal gas is a constant at a specific temperature and pressure. Investigate the relationship between temperature, pressure and volume for a fixed mass of an ideal gas and analyse graphs relating these variables.
